title: BIS Stats API Schema
description: JSON Schema definitions for the BIS SDMX RESTful API v1.4.0 parameters and response structures.

flow.description: The statistical domain (aka dataflow) of the data to be returned. Examples: WS_EER, BIS,WS_EER, BIS,WS_EER,1.0

key.description: The (possibly partial) key identifying the data to be returned. Use 'all' for all data, or dimension values separated by dots.

version.description: The version of the artefact. Use 'latest' for the most recent production version.

startPeriod.description: The start of the period for which results should be supplied (inclusive). ISO 8601 dates or SDMX reporting periods.

endPeriod.description: The end of the period for which results should be supplied (inclusive). ISO 8601 dates or SDMX reporting periods.

firstNObservations.description: The maximum number of observations to be returned starting from the oldest one.

lastNObservations.description: The maximum number of observations to be returned starting from the most recent one.

dataDetail.description: The amount of information to be returned for data queries.

structDetail.description: The amount of information to be returned for structure queries.

references.description: Instructs the web service to return (or not) the artefacts referenced by the artefact to be returned.

mode.description: Instructs the web service to return exact or available data constraint.

acreferences.description: Instructs the web service to return (or not) the artefacts referenced by the ContentConstraint.

acceptEncoding.description: Specifies whether the response should be compressed and how.

dataQueryParams.description: Query parameters for data retrieval endpoints.

structureQueryParams.description: Query parameters for structure retrieval endpoints.
